lines.speaker: TzHaar-Mej
lines.text: That what you are... you tough and strong no?

lines.speaker: TzHaar-Mej
lines.text: That what you are... you user of mystic powers no?

lines.speaker: TzHaar-Mej
lines.text: That what you are... you agile and quick no?

lines.speaker: TzHaar-Mej
lines.text: That what you are... you skilled at making things no?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well yes I suppose I am...

lines.speaker: TzHaar-Mej
lines.text: Foolish JalYt, I am TzHaar-Mej, one of the mystics of this city.

lines.speaker: TzHaar-Mej
lines.text: There are the mighty TzHaar-Ket who guard us, the swift TzHaar-Xil who hunt for our food, and the skilled TzHaar-Hur who craft our homes and tools.

lines.speaker: TzHaar-Mej
lines.text: What ever you say, crazy JalYt!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I have a question about my Achievement Diary.

lines.speaker: TzHaar-Mej
lines.text: Sorry, JalYt, I am no longer a diary master. Seek the JalYt in the town above, to the west, known as Pirate Jackie.
